title: Treatment of chikungunya - Canada.ca
content:
## Treatment of chikungunya
Learn how chikungunya is diagnosed and how it is treated.
- How is chikungunya diagnosed?
- How is chikungunya treated?

## How is chikungunya diagnosed?
Health care providers diagnose chikungunya based on:
- laboratory test results
- what time of the year you were likely bitten
- what area of the world you were in when you were likely bitten by a mosquito

## How is chikungunya treated?
Chikungunya has no specific treatment. Medication may help to relieve some of the disease symptoms, such as reducing:
- inflammation (swelling)
